projectDescription: A financial and accounting educational web platform for Tecnologico de Monterrey that enables professors to run classroom simulations while students analyze real business data through interactive dashboards.
keyFeatures: Excel-based financial data upload and parsing (Overview, Revenue, Costs, Expenses, Accounts sheets)
Interactive financial dashboard with income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow views
Revenue forecasting with multiple statistical methods (Simple/Double Moving Average, Exponential Smoothing, Winter's method, Linear Regression)
Project evaluation simulator computing NPV, IRR, ROI, and break-even
Multi-role platform: students, professors, institution admins, and super-admins
Classroom game mechanics allowing professors to create and manage financial analysis games
Institution registration and multi-tenant management via institution slug routing
PDF export for financial statements using jsPDF and jsPDF-autotable
publicApiSurface: processExcelData(initialData) — parses uploaded Excel workbook into structured financial data
getStatements(bizInfo, overviewData, revenueData, costsData, expensesData) — computes income statement entries per month
getNPV(lifetime, cashflows, discountRate) — calculates Net Present Value
getIRR(lifetime, inflows, outflows, initialInv, precomputedNPV) — calculates Internal Rate of Return via bisection
getROI(inflows, outflows, initialInv) — calculates Return on Investment percentage
getBreakEven(lifetime, inflows, outflows, cashflows, initialInv) — calculates break-even period in years
createForecastStore() — creates Redux store for the sales forecasting simulator
createProjEvalStore() — creates Redux store for the project evaluation simulator
